aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Exodus Industries due to a lack of structured conversational content and insufficient authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content addressing common customer queries.
Enhance authority by showcasing certifications and industry awards.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, operational status, and contact information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is inactive or not utilized.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data prevents AI from recognizing their expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'best general contractors in Franklin, TN' or 'luxury home remodeling services'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding an FAQ section with answers to common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed project showcases to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to the machines that power modern search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Exodus Industries is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current website lacks FAQ content and structured data, which are critical for AI to cite and recommend businesses.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates conversational content, structured data, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in the new search landscape.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Exodus Industries: Close the Visibility Gap Now!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key areas where AI models overlook your expertise.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI and boost your lead generation.
